name: Limestone Park Ipswich Netball Safety Rails
description: Council installed new safety handrail, sandstone blocks and turf at the Ipswich Netball Courts in Limestone Park.
status: Works to install new handrail, sandstone blocks and turf was completed on 11 April 2025.
what_to_expect: Sections of the park will be unavailable during construction
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

name: Marie Street Embankment Stabilisation
description: Council has completed road embankment stabilisation works on Marie Street, Goodna.
what_to_expect: Some delays and detours during construction.
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

name: Gordon Street Pedestrian Link
description: Council is improving the pedestrian link along Gordon Street through the existing Queensland Rail underpass. Works will also include a pedestrian refuge and crossing on Bremer Street and King Edward Parade.
status: Construction commenced on 15 June 2026 and is anticipated to be complete by mid-September 2026. During construction, access to Gordon Street from Bremer Street and King Edward Parade will be closed to all traffic until completion of the project. There are no changes to northbound traffic. Please follow all detour signage and traffic control on site.
what_to_expect: Increase of noise from machinery, lane closures, and traffic control on site.
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

name: Gordon Street - Road Resurfacing
description: Council undertook road pavement repairs followed by resurfacing works on Gordon Street between Limestone Street and Brisbane Street, Ipswich.
what_to_expect: You may experience changed traffic conditions, delays in access in and out of properties, road closures, detours, slight delays, traffic control, some night works as necessary and an increase in noise from machinery.
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

extras.title: Notification of Night Works - Road Resurfacing - Gordon Street, Ipswich
Road resurfacing and road rehabilitation fact sheet

name: Ipswich City Centre Bikeway – Stage 1
description: Council is planning the installation of a commuter bikeway from the intersection of Thorn Street and South Street to East Street and South Street, Ipswich
status: Early planning for the project is complete with design scheduled to be delivered in the 2025-2026 and 2026-2027 financial year. Early community consultation commenced in March 2022 via Council's Shape Your Ipswich website. Construction is planned for the 2027-2028 financial year and will be dependent on funding in future Council budgets.
what_to_expect: Design will be released for comment as the project progresses
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

name: Redbank Plains Road Upgrade – Stage 3
description: Council is upgrading Redbank Plains Road between Cedar Road and School Road, Redbank Plains, including additional traffic lanes, intersection upgrades and active transport facilities.
what_to_expect: Traffic changes, night works, and construction noise during works.
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

name: Johnston Street Road Rehabilitation
description: Rehabilitation of the road pavement on Johnston Street, Bellbird Park.
what_to_expect: Temporary lane closures and traffic control during works.
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

name: Springfield Parkway Road Upgrade – Stage 2
description: Upgrade of Springfield Parkway, including additional traffic lanes and intersection improvements.
what_to_expect: Traffic changes, temporary road closures at times.
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

name: Ripley Road and Reif Street Intersection Upgrade
description: Upgrade of the intersection at Ripley Road and Reif Street, Flinders View.
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

name: Ripley Road and Fischer Road Upgrade - Stage 1
description: Upgrade of Ripley Road between Cunningham Highway and Monterea Road, Ripley.
what_to_expect: Significant traffic changes and detours over the construction period.
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

name: Purga School Road Bridge Replacement and Road Rehabilitation Works
description: Replacement of the bridge on Purga School Road and rehabilitation of the road pavement.
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

name: Blackstone Road - Drainage Rehabilitation
description: Drainage rehabilitation works on Blackstone Road, Silkstone.
what_to_expect: Lane closures and traffic control during works.
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

name: Mansfield Place ATAP Footpath
description: Upgrade existing footpath and kerb ramps to comply with Australian Standards for disability and improve visual amenity from East Street to Bell Street, Ipswich as part of the implementation of iGO Active Transport Action Plan.
what_to_expect: Some pedestrian detours around the works.
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch

name: Marsden Parade (Gordon Street) Footpath
description: Pedestrian link through the existing Queensland Rail underpass on Gordon Street, Ipswich.
status: Design underway. Construction is programmed across 2025-2026 and 2026-2027 with total budgeted funding of $1.6M. This project appears in the Capital Works Program 2025-2028 (page 4).
what_to_expect: Design phase; construction impacts to follow.
managed_by: Asset and Infrastructure Services Department - Capital Delivery Branch
